text:
## Weekly Update - 2026-05-10

Hey <@&1424461167883194418>, we merged 41 PRs this week. Lots of new models, fewer mystery errors, and a massive wave of community apps.

🧠 **Models & Embeddings**
- Meta Llama models and Gemma (via DeepInfra) are now wired up for text.
- Added the Seedance 2.0 video model via Replicate.
- Restacked the embeddings modality for better stability.

🐛 **Making Errors Less Terrible**
- Generic 500s are useless. We now surface actual upstream error codes so you know exactly what broke when a request fails.
- Replicate content-filter rejections now properly map to 4xx errors instead of blowing up.
- Image gen now properly respects user-provided width/height by dropping aggressive pre-scaling.

💸 **BYOP & Infrastructure**
- Simplified BYOP (Bring Your Own Provider) margin billing and clarified the developer earnings copy.
- Better cloud-provider key rotation under the hood for OpenRouter, DeepInfra, and AWS.

🌸 **Community App Harvest**
- 13 new apps joined the ecosystem this week. Everything from `PolliGPT` and `ZenWall AI` to a toddler QR card generator. You all have been busy.

Oh, and Discord messages now properly handle media handlers for tables, LaTeX, and code blocks. Finally.

Check the [repo](https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations) for the full commit log. Happy building.
